name: Rust
author: ops@refx.example
description: Facepunch's survival sandbox. SteamCMD-installed dedicated server with Oxide/uMod support and live map configuration.

installScript.script:
#!/bin/bash
# ReFx steamcmd shim — the steamcmd:debian/proton install image ships no
# `steamcmd` on PATH. Bootstrap SteamCMD and expose it on PATH so the egg's
# `steamcmd ...` calls resolve (otherwise the game server never downloads).
if ! command -v steamcmd >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  mkdir -p /mnt/server/steamcmd
  curl -sSL https://steamcdn-a.akamaihd.net/client/installer/steamcmd_linux.tar.gz | tar zxf - -C /mnt/server/steamcmd || { echo "ERROR: failed to fetch steamcmd"; exit 1; }
  chmod +x /mnt/server/steamcmd/steamcmd.sh /mnt/server/steamcmd/linux32/steamcmd 2>/dev/null || true
  printf '#!/bin/sh\nexec /mnt/server/steamcmd/steamcmd.sh "$@"\n' > /usr/local/bin/steamcmd
  chmod +x /usr/local/bin/steamcmd
fi
set -euo pipefail
mkdir -p /mnt/server/steamcmd
cd /mnt/server
steamcmd +force_install_dir /mnt/server +login anonymous +app_update 258550 validate +quit
if [ "${OXIDE}" = "true" ]; then
  curl -fsSL -o oxide.zip https://umod.org/games/rust/download/develop
  unzip -o oxide.zip -d /mnt/server && rm -f oxide.zip
fi
echo 'Rust install complete.'

variables.description: The name shown in the in-game server browser.
Procedural map size in meters. 3000-4500 recommended for most servers.
Procedural generation seed. Same seed + size produces the same map.
TCP port for the RCON/web-rcon interface.
Install the uMod (Oxide) modding framework on (re)install.

longDescription: Survive, build and raid on your own Rust server. Tune wipe schedules, plugins and player counts for your community.
